name: OctaCam - Camera Utility for Creators
description: Lightweight, high-performance browser camera studio for content creators, live streamers, and video recordings. Features real-time 3D LUT color grading, chroma key, audio enhancement, FPS control, and photo snapshot gallery.

shortcuts.name: Take Photo
shortcuts.description: Open OctaCam and take a photo snapshot

shortcuts.name: Start Recording
shortcuts.description: Open OctaCam and start video recording
